page_metadata.biotools__summary: Binding sites analyser is a database driven software and stores all of its data in a relational database management system (RDBMS) such as SQL Server in Windows or PostgreSQL on Linux.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Binding sites analyser is a database driven software and stores all of its data in a relational database management system (RDBMS) such as SQL Server in Windows or PostgreSQL on Linux.
